text.title: langchain-production-patterns Hardening Procedure
text.summary: Seven steps from a reliability profile to a validated hardening plan + patch.

step.name: parse-profile
step.action: Load YAML; coerce types; reject if target_uptime, latency_budget_ms, providers, dep_policy missing.

step.name: decide-fallbacks
step.action: If providers>=2 and target_uptime>=0.99 → list every non-primary as fallback in priority order; else empty.

step.name: decide-retry
step.action: latency<500ms → max_attempts=2 linear; 500-2000ms → max_attempts=3 exponential; >2000ms → max_attempts=5 exponential.

step.name: decide-configurable
step.action: Expose model + temperature as configurable_fields so runtime can swap without redeploy.

step.name: decide-pinning
step.action: locked → exact-hash via uv/pip-tools; floating → minor-upper-bound + Dependabot.

step.name: emit-patch
step.action: Render templates/chain-hardening-patch.py with the chosen wrappers in order.
